phases.title: Runtime Foundation
phases.goal: Establish deterministic project/config resolution and auditable run execution boundaries.

tasks.title: Project Resolution And Config Loading
tasks.goal: Commands can find project root, load TOML config, and resolve machine paths.
constraints: Do not guess between multiple possible project roots.
Do not overwrite existing user config silently.
expected_outputs: CLI --project support or equivalent explicit project resolution
acceptance_criteria: Commands resolve project context from cwd or explicit project path.
Missing project/config errors are clear and non-mutating.
completion_evidence: python -m pytest tests/test_config.py tests/test_cli.py -q -> 7 passed in 1.37s

tasks.title: Run Lifecycle, Audit Directory, And Locking
tasks.goal: Run records match the approved directory shape and mutating commands have a concurrency stance.
constraints: Run record must be written before command mutation.
Locking must be local and file-backed.
expected_outputs: Run directories with run.json, input.json, diagnostics.md, host-tasks, artifacts
Local project lock for mutating commands
acceptance_criteria: Partial and cancelled run statuses are supported.
Concurrent mutating command attempts have explicit failure behavior.
completion_evidence: python -m pytest tests/test_runs.py tests/test_workflow.py -q -> 6 passed in 0.11s

tasks.title: Manifest Schema Evolution And Atomic State Writes
tasks.goal: State manifest becomes versioned, richer, and safer to persist.
out_of_scope: Full migration framework beyond current schema needs
constraints: Manifest paths must be project-relative POSIX paths.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest includes schema_version, sources, pages, links, and indexes.
Existing minimal manifest handling is controlled.
completion_evidence: python -m pytest tests/test_state_runs.py tests/test_state_schema.py -q -> 6 passed in 0.13s

phases.title: First Useful Workflows
phases.goal: Add source ingest, static lint, and reconcile behavior without LLM dependencies.

tasks.title: Ingest Workflow V1
tasks.goal: File sources can be copied into raw, hashed, registered, and audited.
constraints: External file inputs copy into raw by default.
Existing raw files are not overwritten silently.
expected_outputs: Registered source records linked to run id
acceptance_criteria: External markdown file is copied into raw and registered.
completion_evidence: python -m pytest tests/test_ingest.py tests/test_cli.py -q -> 7 passed in 2.46s

tasks.title: Static Lint And Reconcile Foundation
tasks.goal: Vault health and drift can be inspected without LLM calls.
constraints: Reconcile must not overwrite published human edits.
Conflict output must go to staging or run artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Missing frontmatter and broken wikilinks are reported.
Modified published page is detected without overwrite.
completion_evidence: static lint checkpoint: python -m pytest tests/test_linting.py tests/test_cli.py -q -> 7 passed in 1.49s
static lint checkpoint: python -m pytest tests -q -> 25 passed in 2.32s
python -m pytest tests/test_linting.py tests/test_reconcile.py tests/test_cli.py -q -> 8 passed in 1.46s
post-review fix: python -m pytest tests/test_linting.py tests/test_reconcile.py tests/test_cli.py -q -> 9 passed in 1.95s
post-review fix: python -m pytest tests -q -> 30 passed in 2.83s

phases.title: Host Exchange Protocol
phases.goal: Define the first stable versioned task/result JSON protocol for host-assisted workflows.

tasks.title: Host Task And Result Artifact Protocol
tasks.goal: Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode can share versioned file-backed handoff artifacts.
constraints: Task packets declare allowed read/write roots.
expected_outputs: RunStore helpers for host task/result paths
acceptance_criteria: Valid host task packets can be written and loaded.
Invalid host results are rejected before consumption.
completion_evidence: python -m pytest tests/test_hosts.py tests/test_runs.py -q -> 6 passed in 0.10s
